location: On a corpse inside Castle Morne, Weeping Peninsula. Walk the castle's western wall to a building with a blue roof, jump onto it and then down to the cliffs below, follow the cliffs southeast to a section of the castle with a large square opening, and drop down onto the wooden beams inside — the corpse holding the whip sits against the wall in that room.
tactics: The room with the corpse is filled with rats and a Misbegotten enemy, so clear or carefully avoid them before looting.
Landing on the wooden beams instead of dropping straight to the floor is what lets you reach the corpse safely — a mistimed jump sends you past the room.
This is a standalone item pickup, separate from Castle Morne's Irina/Edgar questline content happening elsewhere in the same dungeon — don't assume you need to progress that quest first.
lore: A plain leather lash never designed as a proper weapon — originally just a tool for inflicting pain and punishment, not for fighting.

builds.name: Early Strength/Dexterity poke
builds.why: Fairly even scaling between Strength and Dexterity plus low stat requirements make it an easy, cheap early pickup for a quality-leaning build.

builds.name: Infused status poke
builds.why: As a fully infusable regular weapon it can take Blood or Poison affinities early, giving a low-level character a cheap status-proc poke that also can't be parried or guarded against.
